zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Eleanor Arundel於大約1415年出生在英國素可阿盧德爾 卡素時，她的父親Sir Thomas Arundel30歲，母親Johanna Moyne14歲。她於大約1434年與Thomas Browne結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1469年6月1日在英國素瑞貝華斯享年55歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Eleanor Arundel于大约1415年出生在英国素可阿盧德爾 卡素时，她的父亲Sir Thomas Arundel30岁，母亲Johanna Moyne14岁。她于大约1434年与Thomas Browne结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1469年6月1日在英国素瑞貝華斯享年55岁。

nameMeanings.name: Arundel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: (of Norman origin): nickname from Old French arondel ‘little swallow’ (a diminutive of arond ‘swallow’, from Latin hirundo).

habitational name from a place so named in West Sussex, from Old English hārhūne ‘horehound’ (a wild plant, Marrubium vulgare) + dell ‘valley’. This place is the seat of the dukes of Norfolk. In northern England, folk etymology resulted in variants such as Arendale .

variants.name: Arrindell
meanings: West Indian (Dutch Caribbean and the Dominican Republic): probably an altered form of English   Arundel  .

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Eleanor Arundel was born about 1415, in Arundel Castle, Sussex, England, her father, Sir Thomas Arundel, was 30 and her mother, Johanna Moyne, was 14. She married Thomas Browne about 1434. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 1 June 1469, in Betchworth, Surrey, England, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Eleanor Arundel est née environ 1415, à Arundel Castle, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas Arundel, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Johanna Moyne, avait 14 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Browne environ 1434. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 1 juin 1469, à Betchworth, Surrey, Angleterre, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Eleanor Arundel um 1415 in Arundel Castle, Sussex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Thomas Arundel 30 und ihre Mutter Johanna Moyne 14. Sie hat um 1434 Thomas Browne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 1. Juni 1469 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Betchworth, Surrey, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Eleanor Arundel è nata il circa 1415 nel Arundel Castle, Sussex, England, sua padre, Sir Thomas Arundel, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Johanna Moyne, aveva 14 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Browne circa 1434. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 1 giugno 1469, nel Betchworth, Surrey, England, all'età di 55 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Eleanor Arundelが約1415年にイギリススセックスアルンデル カストルで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Arundelは30歳，母Johanna Moyneは14歳であった。約1434年にThomas Browneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1469年6月1日にイギリススリーベトチウオルスで55歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Eleanor Arundel(이)가 대략 1415년 영국 수세스 아런들 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Thomas Arundel(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Johanna Moyne(은)는 14세였다. 그녀는 대략 1434년 Thomas Browne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1469년 6월 1일 영국 수리 베트ch워스에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Betchworth Castle, Surrey, England: Betchworth, Sūþrīge, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Eleanor Arundel nasceu aproximadamente 1415, em Arundel Castle, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas Arundel, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Johanna Moyne, tinha 14 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Browne aproximadamente 1434. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1 de junho de 1469, em Betchworth, Surrey, Inglaterra, com 55 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Eleanor Arundel родилась около 1415 г. в местности арундель кастл, суссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Thomas Arundel было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Johanna Moyne, 14. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Browne около 1434 г. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла 1 июня 1469 г. в местности бечворт, сурри, Англия в возрасте 55 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Eleanor Arundel nació aproximadamente 1415, en Arundel Castle, Sussex, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Thomas Arundel, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Johanna Moyne, tenía 14 años. Se casó con Thomas Browne aproximadamente 1434. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 1 de junio de 1469, en Betchworth, Surrey, Inglaterra, a la edad de 55 años.
